baseImage.prompt: A beautiful cinematic close-up portrait of an original female character, early 30s, expressive face, neutral resting expression, direct eye contact with camera, natural skin texture, soft studio key light, subtle rim light, clean background, hair pulled back enough to clearly show eyebrows, eyelids, cheeks, lips, jaw and neck. Photorealistic editorial film still, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, high detail, no text, no watermark, no heavy makeup, no occluding hands, no sunglasses.

baseImageCandidates.promptTemplate: A stunning cinematic close-up portrait of an original female character, early 30s, {{descriptor}}, expressive face, calm neutral resting expression, direct eye contact with camera, elegant natural styling, natural skin texture, soft studio key light, subtle rim light, refined color grading, clean dark-neutral background, hair styled back enough to clearly show eyebrows, eyelids, cheeks, lips, jaw and neck. Photorealistic editorial film still, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, high detail, symmetrical readable face for facial-performance animation, no text, no watermark, no heavy makeup, no occluding hands, no sunglasses.

selectedBaseImage.name: 04-latina
selectedBaseImage.notes: Selected from the five base-image candidates. Upscaled with fal Topaz before Seedance generation.

clips.name: multi-au-hypnotic-sequence
clips.prompt: Use the provided character image as the fixed identity reference. 15s, 1:1, 14 beats, beat-synced, cinematic tight close-up, subtle neutral background, high facial clarity, slow micro push-in, shallow depth of field. The FACS reference grid is only for interpreting Action Unit labels. Do not copy the grid character, layout, clothing, or background. Beat sequence: 1: AU10 upper lip raiser. 2: AU20 lip stretcher. 3: AU22 lip funneler. 4: AU23 lip tightener. 5: AU27 mouth stretch. 6: AU28 lip suck. 7: AU45 blink. 8: AU53 head up. 9: AU61 eyes turn left. 10: AU62 eyes turn right. 11: AU64 eyes down. 12: AU85 tongue out. 13: AU84 tongue up. 14: AU46 wink. Uneasy, hypnotic, controlled mood. No monster transformation, no gore, no comedy, no text overlay, no watermark. Preserve identity, face shape, skin texture, hair, lighting, framing, and background.
